channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: No Rest for the Wicked Launches on PS5 First
item.description: No Rest for the Wicked will debut on PS5 this October, not as an exclusive but due to scheduling. Xbox players will have to wait.

item.title: Summer Game Fest 2026: What to Expect
item.description: Geoff Keighley’s Summer Game Fest promises exciting reveals, with Miss Piggy confirmed. Fans anticipate surprises and disappointments alike.

item.title: ChatGPT Enhances Memory for Better Conversations
item.description: ChatGPT introduces a new memory feature to retain user preferences, improving context in conversations. This aims to enhance user experience significantly.

item.title: Microsoft Revives Windows at Build Conference
item.description: Microsoft showcased Windows prominently at its Build developer conference, signaling renewed focus on the platform. Exciting updates are on the horizon.

item.title: Elden Ring: Tarnished Edition Coming to Switch 2
item.description: Elden Ring: Tarnished Edition will launch on Switch 2 in August, featuring new DLC and classes. Fans eagerly await this release.

item.title: Pokémon TCG Live Celebrates Third Anniversary
item.description: Pokémon Trading Card Game Live marks its third anniversary with special events and giveaways throughout June. Fans can participate in various activities.

item.title: Nintendo's New Switch 2 Features Replaceable Battery
item.description: Nintendo confirms new Switch 2 hardware with a replaceable battery, enhancing sustainability. Joy-Con details remain unclear.

item.title: Prepare for Destiny 2’s Major June 9 Update
item.description: Destiny 2's significant update arrives on June 9, prompting players to prepare for the game's grand finale. Excitement builds among the community.

item.title: Ace Combat 8 Preview: Stunning Visuals and Story
item.description: Ace Combat 8 impresses with its visuals and gameplay improvements, offering a deep story. Players are eager for more details.

item.title: Warhammer Opens New Locations in Kraków and More
item.description: Warhammer announces new Open events in Kraków, Atlanta, and Palm Springs, including the first-ever event in Poland. Fans can look forward to grand narratives.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Chassis Leak Sparks Controversy
item.description: Leaked images of the iPhone 18 Pro chassis may be AI-manipulated, raising questions about authenticity. Apple fans remain skeptical.

item.title: Mina the Hollower: Hidden Secrets Await Players
item.description: Yacht Club Games hints that many players miss half of Mina the Hollower's content, teasing hidden secrets. The community is encouraged to explore further.

item.title: Oura Ring 5: A Compact Smart Ring Review
item.description: The Oura Ring 5 is now 40% smaller and starts at $399, offering advanced health tracking features. Users are excited about its compact design.

item.title: PS5 Fans Praise Latest State of Play Showcase
item.description: 70% of PS5 fans rated the latest State of Play highly, marking it as one of the best showcases. Enthusiasm remains high despite some leaks.

item.title: Wearable Tech: Oura Ring's Impact on Health Tracking
item.description: Wearable devices like the Oura ring provide valuable health insights, but regular doctor visits remain essential. Users share mixed experiences with wearables.
